articles.title: Victor Wembanyama's Most Dominant Skill: Shot Prevention
articles.original_title: Why Victor Wembanyama's most dominant skill remain...
articles.summary: While Wembanyama is known for his shot‑blocking, ESPN argues his greatest defensive asset is his ability to deter opponents from attempting shots altogether. His length, timing, and presence force teams to alter offensive schemes before the ball leaves the shooter’s hand.
key_points: Wembanyama's rim protection extends beyond traditional blocks.
His presence reduces opponent field‑goal attempts in the paint.
Coaches highlight his impact on altering shot selection and offensive flow.
